Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion of judgment debtor Vaya Telecom Inc. to strike an assignment by judgment creditor of Pacific Bell Telephone Company (purportedly made on January 21, 2025, notice of which was filed with the court on March 3, 2025), is ordered off calendar as moot. An amended notice of assignment was filed with the court on August 6, 2025, after the filing of this motion.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VAYA TELECOM, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Vaya Telecom, Inc.'s demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. Counsel's declaration indicates that such a meet and confer did not occur. The parties are ordered to met and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by February 8, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
